programme.title: Ridiculousness S8 Ep. 814
programme.desc: On an all-new episode of Ridiculousness, Rob, Sterling, and Chanel go "Flame Dumb," test out their hand skills in "Snatch Masters," and slow-mo man's best friend in "Goooooooddddd Boooooooyyyyy."

programme.title: Ridiculousness S7 Ep. 722
programme.desc: On an all-new episode of Ridiculousness, Rob, Chanel and Sterling are joined by rapper and reality TV star Ja Rule to "Keep It On The Green," run in terror from "Ja Ghouls" and be driven crazy by "These Damn Kids!"

programme.title: Ridiculousness S8 Ep. 823

programme.title: Ridiculousness S9 Ep. 20
programme.desc: On an all-new episode of Ridiculousness, Rob, Chanel, and Steelo get jammed up in STUCK MY LIFE, take their chances in GATOR GAMBLIN' and enlist in the GRAVY SEALS.

programme.title: Ridiculousness S7 Ep. 714

programme.title: Ridiculousness S9 Ep. 27

programme.desc: On an all-new episode of Ridiculousness, Rob, Steelo and Chanel get dodge ball damaged in RUBBER STAMPED, become masters of disguise with BLENDERS, and get too honest dropping TRUTH BOMBS

programme.title: South Park S1 Ep. 8
programme.desc: Thanksgiving Episode- Mistaking Cartman for a starving African child, government authorities send him to Ethiopia where he runs into Sally Struthers.

programme.title: South Park S1 Ep. 9
programme.desc: Mr Hankey, The Christmas Poo: The Mayor decides to impose a holiday theme which won't offend anybody. Kyle tries to convince everyone that Mr Hankey (a singing Christmas poo) exists. (S1, E09)

programme.title: South Park S1 Ep. 10
programme.desc: Damien: The new kid in class persuades Jesus to do battle with his father, Satan, in the final battle of good versus evil. Cartman is livid to learn the bout clashes with his birthday. (S1, E10)

programme.title: South Park S1 Ep. 11
programme.desc: Tom's Rhinoplasty: The boys become lesbians to impress a new teacher, making Wendy jealous. Also, to his delight, Mr. Garrison's plastic surgery leaves him looking like David Hasselhoff. (S1, E11)

programme.title: South Park S1 Ep. 12
programme.desc: Mecha-Streisand: Cartman and Kyle fall out over a magic triangle they un-earth on an archaeological dig. The triangle yields the power to turn Barbra Streisand into a terrible monster. (S1, E12)

programme.title: South Park S1 Ep. 13
programme.desc: Cartman's Mum Is A Dirty S**t (1): Dr. Mephisto helps Cartman un-cover the truth about his dad's identity. The spotlight is on quite a few of South Park's male residents. Who could it be? (S1, E13)

programme.title: South Park S2 Ep. 2
programme.desc: Cartman's Mum Is Still A Dirty S**t (2): Dr Mephisto is shot before he reveals who Cartman's father is. Who exactly shot him? Meanwhile, the rest of the town try to deal with a blizzard. (S2, E02)

programme.title: South Park S2 Ep. 3
programme.desc: When Barbrady resigns, anarchy ensues and the boys pitch in to help.

programme.title: South Park S2 Ep. 4
programme.desc: Ike's Wee Wee: Kyle misunderstands what circumcision is and thinks he has to save Ike's penis from being cut off! Mr. Mackey is fired, and turns to drugs - "drugs are bad, m'kay?" (S2, E04)

programme.title: South Park S2 Ep. 5
programme.desc: Conjoined Fetus Lady: Kyle is terrified because he has to see the school nurse, who has a scary deformity. Meanwhile, the school dodgeball team goes to China - only Pip can save them now. (S2, E05)

programme.title: South Park S2 Ep. 7
programme.desc: City On The Edge Of Forever: The school bus ends up perched on the edge of a ravine after it crashes in a snowstorm. Must be time for some flashbacks then! Can these memories be trusted? (S2, E07)

programme.title: South Park S2 Ep. 8
programme.desc: Summer Sucks: The boys' plans for 4th of July celebrations are ruined when the State bans fireworks. It's up to Uncle Jimbo and Ned to save the day with a little trip down Meheeco way. (S2, E08)

programme.title: South Park S2 Ep. 9
programme.desc: Chef's Chocolate Salty Balls: The Sundance Film Festival is in South Park but it's not long before Hollywood culture is over running the town and polluting the sewer where Mr Hankey lives. (S2, E09)

programme.title: South Park S2 Ep. 10
programme.desc: Chickenpox: The boys are sent to Kenny's for the night, so they can all get chickenpox. The boys decide to get even on their parents by hiring a prostitute with mouth herpes to infect them. (S2, E10)

programme.title: South Park S2 Ep. 11
programme.desc: Roger Ebert Should Lay Off The Fatty Foods: The boys are taken to the planetarium but Cartman has other ideas and decides to audition to sing the Cheesy Poofs song on their next advert. (S2, E11)

programme.title: South Park S2 Ep. 12
programme.desc: Clubhouses: Stan and Kyle build a clubhouse, so they can play truth or dare with Wendy and Bebe. Cartman and Kenny decide to build their own rival clubhouse based on The Ewoks Village. (S2, E12)

programme.title: South Park S2 Ep. 13
programme.desc: Cow Days: The boys try to win Terrance and Phillip dolls at the carnival but a dodgy carnie keeps changing the rules - time to call "shenanigans"! Cartman dates Leonardo DiCaprio. (S2, E13)

programme.title: South Park S2 Ep. 14
programme.desc: Chef Aid: Chef realises that Alanis Morissette's (fictional) hit song "Stinky Britches" is a song that he wrote years ago but the record company aren't interested in giving him any credit. (S2, E14)

programme.title: South Park S2 Ep. 15
programme.desc: Spooky Fish: When Stan is given a fish by his Aunt, he has a feeling there's something not quite right about it. Sure enough it's not long before there's evil goings on. (In spooky vision!) (S2, E15)

programme.title: South Park S2 Ep. 16
programme.desc: Merry Christmas, Charlie Manson!: Cartman's Uncle Howard escapes from prison with another inmate, Charlie Manson. The boys want to go see Mr Hankey at the mall but no one will take them. (S2, E16)

programme.title: South Park S2 Ep. 17
programme.desc: Gnomes (a.k.a. Underpants Gnomes): The boys must write an essay for school. Tweek suggests they write about gnomes that visit him every night and steal his pants. What will they discover? (S2, E17)

programme.title: South Park S3 Ep. 1
programme.desc: Rainforest Schmainforest: The boys go to the Costa Rican rainforest as a part of the "Getting Gay With Kids" choir tour, but Cartman is on a mission to cause havoc. Jennifer Aniston guests. (S3, E01)

programme.title: South Park S3 Ep. 2
programme.desc: Spontaneous Combustion: The citizens of South Park are randomly exploding and it's up to Stan to find the cause. Kyle discovers his dad is having problems with erectile dysfunction. (S3, E02)

programme.title: Daria S1 Ep. 3
programme.desc: When the Morgendorffers visit Jack and Helen's alma mater as part of a college prep course, Daria learns the truth about academia, and Quinn gets a taste of Greek life.

programme.title: Ugly Americans S1 Ep. 13
programme.desc: Randall shambles his way onto an all-creature reality show, and a troll wrestles with riddle addiction.

programme.title: The Ren & Stimpy Show S4 Ep. 3

programme.title: The Ren & Stimpy Show S4 Ep. 1
programme.desc: Ren and Stimpy host your favorite nature show; Untamed World. In this episode they go in search of the dying breed of the lummox. Deep in the wood they find a freckled red neck known as Booger Red.

programme.title: Drawn Together S1 Ep. 2
programme.desc: Clara's roommates attempt to find her Prince Charming after she reveals a dark secret.

programme.title: Ugly Americans S1 Ep. 4
programme.desc: Mark accidentally outs Randall as a zombie, and Leonard tries to identify a strange new creature.

programme.title: Daria S2 Ep. 3
programme.desc: Quinn's attempt to bring up her grades to avoid failing English alters her reputation, and Daria faces an identity crisis.

programme.title: Drawn Together S3 Ep. 5
programme.desc: Captain Hero stocks up on weapons after a burglary. Toot lives her food dreams.

programme.title: Daria S3 Ep. 307
programme.desc: As a hurricane approaches Lawndale, the town's residents spontaneously break into song, and Daria, Jane, Brittany, and Kevin are forced to brace the storm together.

programme.title: Ugly Americans S2 Ep. 5
programme.desc: When his favorite TV series ends with a dumb twist, Grimes has a complete mental breakdown.

programme.title: The Ren & Stimpy Show S1 Ep. 4
programme.desc: Ren and Stimpy get jobs as fire dogs and save a cast full of characters during a 40-story building fire. After reading the story of the Littlest Giant'

programme.title: Ugly Americans S2 Ep. 4
programme.desc: Lady Hoo-Ha, America's most adored pop star, goes zombie, and her many devoted fans follow suit.

programme.title: Ugly Americans S2 Ep. 17
programme.desc: Callie's psychotic, prankster ex-boyfriend escapes from an asylum and wreaks havoc on Mark's life.

programme.title: Drawn Together S1 Ep. 3
programme.desc: The roommates encourage Xandir to discover his true sexual identity.

programme.title: Daria S4 Ep. 410
programme.desc: When Quinn and the Fashion Club find themselves stranded after a botched bus ride, Jake and Daria take Trent's old car to get them.

programme.title: Drawn Together S1 Ep. 4
programme.desc: When the roommates are forced to participate in a food challenge, relationships are tested.

programme.title: Daria S2 Ep. 4
programme.desc: The Morgendorffers reluctantly attend a family wedding in which Daria and Quinn are bridesmaids, and Daria finds something in common with her Aunt Amy.

programme.title: Daria S5 Ep. 501
programme.desc: After Lawndale High gets roped into a marketing scheme as a result of school budget cuts, Ms. Li gets in over her head, and Daria takes a stand.

programme.title: The Ren & Stimpy Show S1 Ep. 5
programme.desc: Commander Hoek and Cadet Stimpy's rocket hurtles out of control and leaves them marooned on an eerie uncharted planet, where they attempt to find food and avoid the hideous Brainiac men.

programme.title: Drawn Together S1 Ep. 7
programme.desc: Spanky teaches Clara to step outside of her comfort zone, while Xandir and Captain Hero bond.

programme.title: Ugly Americans S1 Ep. 7
programme.desc: An obsessive-compulsive giant ape needs a job, and Callie struggles with her sudden attraction to Twayne.

programme.title: Daria S4 Ep. 407
programme.desc: Daria joins Jake on a business trip where he tries to court a big-name client, and Helen tries to bond with Quinn at a sleepover.

programme.title: Daria S4 Ep. 404
programme.desc: Daria dreams up a murder mystery at her school after Kevin and the football team are suspected of cheating on a test.

programme.title: The Ren & Stimpy Show S4 Ep. 10
programme.desc: Ren & Stimpy journey to the Blue-Cheese Mountains to become miners. After dealing with some savages, they finally reach the blessed mountains where they mine the cheese and dream of being rich.

programme.title: Ugly Americans S1 Ep. 11
programme.desc: Mark helps Leonard with his magic wand issues, and Twayne Boneraper meets his two-dimensional soulmate.

programme.title: Becker S4 Ep. 4
programme.desc: John helps a homeless man he discovered is a con artist when he learns the man is ill.

programme.title: Becker S4 Ep. 5
programme.desc: John takes Reggies advice to be more sensitive with women. It helps at the office with Margaret, but backfires with a woman he is dating.

programme.title: Becker S4 Ep. 6
programme.desc: John panics when he has to get an MRI, finally resorting to Valium to get through the claustrophobic test.

programme.title: Becker S4 Ep. 8
programme.desc: Reggie goes out to dinner with her abusive friend Sara and Sara's husband, Richard. She finds that she and Richard are attracted to each other.

programme.title: Becker S4 Ep. 9
programme.desc: John tries to keep a casual love affair alive, while Bob tries to turn a found Super Bowl ring into his ticket to fame and fortune.

programme.title: Becker S4 Ep. 10
programme.desc: Christmas Episode- John believes that Christmas is a phony time of the year. Instead of embracing the Christmas spirit, he uses getting robbed as vindication for his position.

programme.title: Becker S4 Ep. 11
programme.desc: John is surprised when a patient is disappointed at the news that he's not terminally ill. Jake scams Bob in a Scrabble game.

programme.title: Becker S4 Ep. 12
programme.desc: Reggie meets Johns's friend Dan, who is recently divorced from an extraordinary, accomplished woman.

programme.title: Becker S4 Ep. 13
programme.desc: Becker and the crew decide to barter services office visits for food and services.

programme.title: Becker S4 Ep. 14
programme.desc: Becker bores a bartender with a story about his ex-wife's wedding.

programme.title: Becker S4 Ep. 15
programme.desc: Becker obsesses over whether or not younger women still find him attractive. Linda takes advantage of a hard-working temp.

programme.title: Becker S4 Ep. 16
programme.desc: Becker gets in hot water with parents when his nutrition lecture at an elementary school turns into a sex talk.

programme.title: Becker S4 Ep. 17
programme.desc: An unflattering picture of someone other than John is placed in an article about him, causing him distress.

programme.title: Becker S4 Ep. 18
programme.desc: John gets a portable talking computer for his speech-impaired patient, with unintended consequences.

programme.title: Becker S4 Ep. 19
programme.desc: Reggie decides to help Jake fulfill some of the dreams he had as a child, with disastrous consequences.

programme.title: Becker S4 Ep. 20
programme.desc: Bob uses a questionable friend to get Reggie a great deal on a new freezer. John acts as a sex therapist for the Bennetts, an 80-year-old couple having difficulties because of Mr. Bennett's newly revived libido.

programme.title: Becker S4 Ep. 21
programme.desc: Dr. John Becker's laundry, apartment, and mail have all been tampered with and he is sure the culprit is one of his pesky neighbors.

programme.title: Becker S4 Ep. 22
programme.desc: When John receives some expensive steaks from a patient, his new neighbor Chris cajoles him into throwing a party.

programme.title: Becker S4 Ep. 23
programme.desc: John is surprisingly concerned when he learns that his new neighbor Chris has left town without saying goodbye.

programme.title: Becker S4 Ep. 24
programme.desc: Reggie and Chris compete for John's affection. Linda takes Margaret out for a night on the town.

programme.title: Becker S5 Ep. 1
programme.desc: John enters the diner from Reggie's apartment, trying to sneak out.

programme.title: Becker S5 Ep. 2
programme.desc: Now that Reggie is gone, John tells Chris he has feelings for her (Chris).

programme.title: Becker S5 Ep. 3
programme.desc: John sits on his fire escape, smoking a cigar, the smoke from which is wafting into Chris's open window directly above.

programme.title: Becker S5 Ep. 4
programme.desc: As John and Jake chat about Chris at the diner, Bob rushes in and announces that he just saw Chris naked when he went to fix her faucet.

programme.title: Under Fire
programme.desc: Someone with a grudge against 15 Division opens fire on Andy and Chloe.

programme.title: You Can See the Stars
programme.desc: The officers have to piece together the truth about a past crime in order to find Oliver Shaw.

programme.title: Blink
programme.desc: Andy and Dov pull themselves together at an all-night diner, but are caught off-guard in a diner hold-up.

programme.title: All By Her Selfie
programme.desc: Oliver gets promoted to Acting Staff Sergeant, and Andy is tasked with training 15 Division’s newest rookie.

programme.title: Heart Breakers, Money Makers
programme.desc: Inspector Jarvis sends the officers to seize all “proceeds of crime” – anything purchased with illegal money.

programme.title: Wanting
programme.desc: After the discovery of an executed gang leader, 15 Division must find the killer before a gang war breaks out.

programme.title: Going Under
programme.desc: When 15 Division goes undercover at a club-land bar, Chris’s erratic behavior make Dov suspicious.

programme.title: Two Truths and a Lie
programme.desc: As the officers try to hunt down the killer of Brian Gowdy – Andy and Sam go on the road for interviews.

programme.title: Deal with the Devil
programme.desc: Oliver prepares Andy to defend herself at Duncan’s dismissal hearing, now happening two hours from now.

programme.title: Exit Strategy
programme.desc: An innocuous call to a middle-class home puts Dov and Chris in the middle of a home invasion investigation.

programme.title: Moving Day

programme.title: Fragments

programme.title: Everlasting

programme.title: Raw S5 Ep. 6
programme.desc: Geoff must decide whether to stay at Raw or return to Australia to take over the family restaurant.

programme.title: The Commander S5 Ep. 1
programme.desc: Commander Blake is assigned to investigate the bludgeoning death of an elderly woman as quickly and quietly as possible while DCI James' wife Zoe goes into labor.

programme.title: The Commander S5 Ep. 3
programme.desc: Brian believes that someone else was in the room with him when he found his mother's body. Commander Blake is forced to take extreme action to find the truth and accept the repercussions. Will they find the abductor of DCI James' baby?

programme.title: The Commander S5 Ep. 2
programme.desc: Did Brian kill his own mother in an alcoholic haze? Who stole DCI James and Zoe's baby? Clare feels the heat of two high-profile cases with personal connections.

programme.title: The Commander S2 Ep. 3
programme.desc: Patient and persistent, Deputy Chief Constable Stephen Blackton (David O'Hara) has earned his nickname, "Blackdog,” as he is called in to re-open the investigation of the Lionel Cripps shooting.

programme.title: The Commander S2 Ep. 4
programme.desc: Graham Warner, the officer implicated in the Lionel Cripps shooting, is found dead in a park. Commander Blake continues to bury evidence of her relationship with James Lampton.

programme.title: The Commander S3 Ep. 1
programme.desc: Graham Warner, the officer implicated in the Lionel Cripps shooting, is found dead in a park. Commander Blake continues to bury evidence of her relationship with James Lampton.

programme.title: The Commander S3 Ep. 2
programme.desc: Dutch DI Count Eric Van Hauten offers to help DCI Hedges with a new murder case. Commander Blake pledges to remain uninvolved, but will she be able to as the threat of more victims increases?

programme.title: Secret State S1 Ep. 1
programme.desc: Deputy Prime Minister Tom Dawkins vows to take on American petrochemical company Petrofex after a devastating accident on British soil.

programme.desc: Following David's escape, Pat is bothered by a horde of reporters.

programme.title: Prisoner Cell Block H S2 Ep. 1

programme.title: Prisoner Cell Block H S2 Ep. 3
programme.desc: Leila conducts a search and finds some worrying objects.

programme.title: Diagnosis Murder S7 Ep. 24
programme.desc: While a deliriously happy Madison helps new love Brett Hayward move in with her, Steve investigates the brutal slaying of palastic surgeon Dr. Yordsberg.

programme.title: Diagnosis Murder S8 Ep. 1
programme.desc: Roger and Lana's marriage is rocky at best. Lana plots for her lover to kill Roger while he is away for the night on business so that she can have all of his money.

programme.title: Diagnosis Murder S8 Ep. 2
programme.desc: While driving, David tells his wife Laura that he wants a divorce. Laura becomes hysterical and begins to cry and hit him. Trying to fight off his wife's attacks, David loses control of the car and flies into an intersection.

programme.title: Diagnosis Murder S8 Ep. 3
programme.desc: Jim, the hospital janitor, teaches Dr. Sloan some magic tricks. Jim is a whiz at magic and can nimbly manipulate a medallion between his fingers.

programme.title: Diagnosis Murder S8 Ep. 4
programme.desc: George, a schizophrenic homeless man, shows up on a beach prophesizing about death. The couple in the nearby beach apartment, Cynthia and Ethan, threaten to call the police.

programme.title: Diagnosis Murder S8 Ep. 5
programme.desc: When Steve Sloan is hospitalized for injuries sustained in a high-speed car chase, he wakes in a haze and watches with a blurred vision what looks like another patient being stabbed by one of the medical staff in his room.

programme.title: Diagnosis Murder S8 Ep. 6
programme.desc: Nurse Stacy Bradshaw tells Dr. Sloan about her skydiving escapades, and he politely turns down her extreme thrill-seeking invitation to come along.

programme.title: Diagnosis Murder S8 Ep. 7
programme.desc: Dr. Travis catches Dr. Sloan in his office, settling in with a bowl of popcorn to watch a reality television show, "Hot House," a "Big Brother" and "Real World" type series.

programme.title: Diagnosis Murder S8 Ep. 8
programme.desc: Mark's friends Stanley and Tammy have decided to preview Tammy's new fashion line at their wedding.

programme.title: Diagnosis Murder S8 Ep. 9
programme.desc: At a spiritual retreat, Beth Scarburough confronts Father Dominick about his failed friendship with her husband, Matt. She pleads for him to make amends with his former friend.

programme.title: Diagnosis Murder S8 Ep. 10
programme.desc: Cocky medical student, Hunter Koskov, coerces his classmates, Max and Jenny, to experiment with each other by inducing "death."

programme.title: Diagnosis Murder S8 Ep. 11
programme.desc: Amanda does a guest spot as a nurse on the soap opera, where she serves as a medical consultant. Star actress Thalia faints during a scene and is rushed to the emergency room.

programme.title: Diagnosis Murder S8 Ep. 12
programme.desc: Julia Adams comes to Dr. Sloan for a check-up. She seems a little anxious. At the same time, a man comes running through the hospital and in one highly restricted lab, knocks over and breaks a test tube.

programme.title: The Only Way Is Essex S5 Ep. 4
programme.desc: We follow the progress of Arg, Billi and Cara in the London Marathon. Bobby gets plastic surgery advice from Chloe and Lauren P. Charlie and Gemma have a heart to heart after Gemma was uncovered as Ricky’s mystery texter.

programme.title: The Only Way Is Essex S5 Ep. 5
programme.desc: Billi, Cara and Arg recover after completing the London marathon. Chloe and the girls take her daughter to the farm for her birthday. Lucy and Mario celebrate their one year anniversary.

programme.title: The Only Way Is Essex S5 Ep. 6
programme.desc: It’s Mick’s birthday and he’s throwing a party Vegas Style – everyone is going. Sam, Billie, Gemma and Lucy try out Pole Dancing. Mario takes Little Chris to get his chest waxed.

programme.title: The Only Way Is Essex S5 Ep. 7
programme.desc: Sam throws a dinner party for all of the ‘couples’. We meet Gemma’s new mystery man Rami. Tom P and Lauren P go on a date to a vineyard- will he do enough to impress her?

programme.title: The Only Way Is Essex S5 Ep. 8
programme.desc: There’s a new girl on the block. The girl Tom K has been texting is revealed and there are a few unhappy campers. We find out the goss after Lauren P’s and Tom P’s snog. Joey’s in trouble with Sam. Nanny Pat gets new dentures.

programme.title: The Only Way Is Essex S5 Ep. 9
programme.desc: Joey thinks he might have made a mistake by dumping Sam, but is it too late? Lucy does a photoshoot for her new swimwear range. It’s the launch night of Bobby’s brand new hairdressing Academy. The tension simmers between Gemma and her ex Charlie.

programme.title: The Only Way Is Essex S5 Ep. 10
programme.desc: The rivalry between the boys escalates and Diags is determined to confront Mario. Lauren comes face-to-face with Tom P questioning him over his decision to choose Lauren P over her. Gemma apologizes to Bobby for ruining his open night.

programme.title: The Only Way Is Essex S6 Ep. 1
programme.desc: Lucy and Mario host their engagement party, but who will be invited? Joey and Sam go on a double date with Essex’s newest couple, Arg and Gemma. Little Chris makes Mario an engagement present, but will he be his best man?

programme.title: The Only Way Is Essex S6 Ep. 2
programme.desc: Mick and Debbie host a glam Essex Sports Day including a three-legged couple race. There is a new romance on the cards for Lauren G. Jess finds herself stuck in the middle of Lucy and Mario and Sam and Joey.

programme.title: The Only Way Is Essex S6 Ep. 3
programme.desc: Joey celebrates his Birthday with an 80’s themed party. Lauren P and Lauren G come face to face for the first time since Lauren G started seeing Tom P. Gemma gets stuck in the middle of a row between boyfriend Arg, and his former girlfriend, Lydia.

programme.title: The Only Way Is Essex S6 Ep. 4
programme.desc: Tom P takes Lauren Goodger to the cinema, for their first date. Jess gives Ricky an ultimatum. Arg turns up on Gemma’s doorstep with a surprise, but will she like it?

programme.title: The Only Way Is Essex S6 Ep. 5
programme.desc: Bobby confides in best friend Lydia that he thinks he's fallen in love with Charlie; Sam and Lucy agree to meet and make up over the cheating accusations against Mario.

programme.title: The Only Way Is Essex S6 Ep. 6
programme.desc: Everyone heads out to celebrate Charlie's birthday; sensing something is wrong with Bobby, Charlie tries to comfort his best friend although Bobby drops a bombshell. Jamie Reed makes quite an impression on a few of the ladies.

programme.title: The Only Way Is Essex S6 Ep. 7
programme.desc: Arg bumps into Jamie, but how will he react? Mario talks to Tom P about texting Jess. Sam hosts a BBQ, but who will turn up?

programme.title: The Only Way Is Essex S6 Ep. 8
programme.desc: Jess hosts a showcase for her new single. Sam and Joey have a tennis lesson, but who will come out on top? New boy Jamie continues to ruffle feathers.

programme.title: The Only Way Is Essex S6 Ep. 9
programme.desc: Lauren Goodger has her doubts about Tom P. Arg takes Gemma for a surprise singing lesson. Bobby celebrates his birthday with a trip to Southend and a gay night out.

programme.title: Geordie Shore S5 Ep. 501
programme.desc: The Geordie Shore gang are back in a pimped up pad and ready to cause chaos once again. (S5, ep1)

programme.title: Geordie Shore S5 Ep. 502
programme.desc: The gang return from Amsterdam and it's time to tear Newcastle a new one. Vicky and Ricci celebrate breaking the Geordie Shore relationship curse and the gang try out speed dating. (S5, ep2)

programme.title: Geordie Shore S5 Ep. 503
programme.desc: There's tension in the Toon, as James brings girlfriend Kate on a night out, leaving Holly unimpressed. The Geordie Shore house explodes as Vicky and Ricci have a row to remember. (S5, ep3)

programme.title: Geordie Shore S5 Ep. 504
programme.desc: The Geordie Tour of Europe is back on as the gang are off to Prague for banter, birds, & booze. The girls get their guns out at the shooting range whilst the boys visit the local strip clubs (S5, ep4)

programme.title: Geordie Shore S5 Ep. 505
programme.desc: The gang return from Prague to a turbulent Toon. The house is in total meltdown as Charlotte and Gary finally come to blows, and it looks like it could be the end for Vicky and Ricci (S5, ep5)

programme.title: Geordie Shore S5 Ep. 506
programme.desc: Charlotte returns to the Geordie Shore house just in time to join the rest of the gang on a Geordie Tour of Barcelona. Our favourite Geordies bathe in the Spanish sun, sea, sex and sangria.

programme.title: Geordie Shore S5 Ep. 507
programme.desc: The gang return from Barcelona with Charlotte's declaration of love for Gary still hanging in the air and Vicky set for a final showdown with Ricci (S5, ep7)

programme.title: Geordie Shore S5 Ep. 508
programme.desc: With the gang cooling off after the biggest fight in the show's history, there's an icy atmosphere between the boys and the girls as they're off to the Alps for their final Geordie Tour (S5, ep8)

programme.title: Geordie Shore S6 Ep. 601
programme.desc: Holly and James still haven't put their differences behind them and are a war zone waiting to happen, Gary and Scott are on a mission to pull every girl in Sydney. (S6, ep1)

programme.title: Geordie Shore S6 Ep. 602
programme.desc: The group are in high spirits as they get a surprise visit from Jay. Charlotte is still coming to terms with her feelings for Gaz. James' battle with Holly is set to continue. (S6, ep2)

programme.title: Geordie Shore S6 Ep. 603
programme.desc: James and Gaz come to blows over pulling and Gaz is forced to leave the house. Vicky tashes on and Holly gets up close and personal with the one and only Scotty T. (S6, ep3)

programme.title: Geordie Shore S6 Ep. 604
programme.desc: Whilst the fittest guy in Australia sends the girls into a spin, Scotty and Gaz square up as nightclubbing gets nasty. House destruction sees Gary head into the bush. (S6, ep4)

programme.title: Geordie Shore S6 Ep. 605
programme.desc: An anger management session is arranged for the group, and Charlotte lets out all her negative feelings towards Gaz. Sophie and Joel gets too drunk and embarrass the group on a night out. (S6, ep5)

programme.title: Geordie Shore S6 Ep. 606
programme.desc: With Charlotte returning from the Bush a new woman, the housemates lay down the law for Scotty, slapping him with a drinking ban hoping that he will stop smashing up the house. (S6, ep6)

programme.title: Jersey Shore S5 Ep. 506
programme.desc: The Situation secretly gathers information to bring down one of his roommates - and for once it isn't Snooki. JWOWW freaks out when Roger disappears and doesn't return her calls. (S5, ep6)

programme.title: Jersey Shore S5 Ep. 507
programme.desc: One of the roommates cause drama with the Snooki and Deena, while Jenni's skimpy outfit creates a problem for Roger. A crazy night at Karma nightclub ends in a fight. (S5, ep7)

programme.title: Jersey Shore S5 Ep. 508
programme.desc: The cast tries to avoid a shark attack when they go fishing. Jenni confronts Pauly's stalker. Snooki sets her sights on Vinny when her boyfriend rejects her affections. (S5, ep8)

programme.title: Jersey Shore S5 Ep. 509
programme.desc: Mike decides he can wait no longer to reveal 'the truth' to Snooki's boyfriend. Pauly, Vinny, and Deena find it difficult to be the single roommates in the Shore House. (S5, ep9)

programme.title: Jersey Shore S5 Ep. 510
programme.desc: A battle royale breaks out after Mike reveals to Jionni that he hooked up with Snooki. Some of the roommates go camping, while Vinny and Pauly pull the greatest prank in Shore history! (S5, ep10)

programme.title: Jersey Shore S5 Ep. 511
programme.desc: As the roommates prepare to leave, Mike starts a rumour about Deena's sister. Pauly and Vinny prank the house, and the Storm of the Century hits the Shore. (S5, ep11)

programme.title: Jersey Shore S5 Ep. 512
programme.desc: The drama continues when the Jersey Shore house mates get together to relive the highs and lows of the past summer.

programme.title: Jersey Shore S6 Ep. 601
programme.desc: Everyone returns to the shore for one last time. The Situation comes clean about his recovery and Snooki faces the challenge of being pregnant in a party house. (S6, ep1)

programme.title: Jersey Shore S6 Ep. 602
programme.desc: The roommates settle in to life at the shore, Deena copes with being away from her boyfriend and Nicole makes an announcement that shocks the house. (S6, ep2)

programme.title: Jersey Shore S6 Ep. 603
programme.desc: There are some big changes in store for the loveable gang, but expect even more all-night partying, hot hook-ups and shocking tantrums than ever before. (S6, ep3)

programme.title: Jersey Shore S6 Ep. 604
